instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `require-keys` that evaluates a plist expression once and signals an error for any listed key whose value (via GETF) is nil. Returns the plist when all required keys are present.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 OPTS))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G1 :NAME) (ERROR "Missing required key ~S" :NAME))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G1 :ID) (ERROR "Missing required key ~S" :ID))
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 OPTS))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G112 :NAME)
              (ERROR "Missing required key ~S" :NAME))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G112 :ID) (ERROR "Missing required key ~S" :ID))
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
